steps: Open the app using the free version
tests.expected_result: The application will provide users with 1/4 of the options of that feature.

steps: Open the app using the free version
Press the upgrade button and select free trial
Enter information and redeem free trial
tests.expected_result: Usesr gain temporary access to all the apps features during the trial period.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The guided meditation will start playing without crashing.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The guided meditation will successfully play until finished.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The completed list of available guided meditations will load in under 1 minute.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The completed list of available sleepcasts will load in under 1 minute.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The completed list of available guided meditations will load and scrolling through will not crash the system.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The completed list of available sleepcasts will load and scrolling through will not crash the system.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The sleepcast will start playing without crashing.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: The sleepcast will successfully play until finished.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: No pop up notifications will display on the home screen.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: No pop up notifications will display in the guided meditation menu.

steps: Open the app on either version
Select the report an issue function
tests.expected_result: Bug report form is succefully submited and viewable by developers.

steps: Open the app on either version
Select the report an issue function
tests.expected_result: Users are able to view their previously submitted bug reports.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: Feedback form is succefully submited and viewable by developers.

steps: Open the app on either version
tests.expected_result: Users are able to view their previously submitted feedback.

steps: Open the app on an andorid device
tests.expected_result: All features are available.

steps: Open the app on an IOS device
tests.expected_result: All features are available.
